items.name: Mourning & After
items.description: Dual relic blades that exist in a way that makes geometry uncomfortable.
items.lore_text: The Last Argument carries two names: one for what came before, one for what remains.
items.relic_lore: Elia's paired blades. Stories claim she cleared a fortified corridor alone in under two minutes.

inlays.name: Coherence Edge
inlays.effect: Sever Synthetic tethers, wards, or locks on contact without extraction backlash.

items.name: Lagrange Combat Weave
items.description: Lightweight tactical armor designed for unrestricted blade movement.
items.lore_text: Cut to allow full range of motion. The seams tell a story of a hundred near-misses.

items.name: Proportional
items.description: Relic rotary cannon. Shapes explosions to suppress collateral.
items.lore_text: Named for the doctrine: force proportional to threat. In Rho's hands, mercy is measured in blast radius.
items.relic_lore: The Breachwright's signature weapon. A liability in seventeen jurisdictions.

inlays.name: Mercy Detonation Bracket
inlays.effect: Shape explosions to reduce collateral. Area attacks gain precision targeting.

items.name: Breachwright Plating
items.description: Heavy armor rated for demolitions work and close-range detonation.
items.lore_text: Every scorch mark is a lesson learned at uncomfortable proximity.

items.name: Veil & Verdict
items.description: Relic dual pistols. Surgical precision through active camouflage.
items.lore_text: The youngest relic weapons. Made by a Sutured weaponsmith who owed a debt.
items.relic_lore: The Silent Verdict's instruments. Targets don't see the shots coming.

inlays.name: Veil Stitch
inlays.effect: Fire through spoofed sensor fields. Create ghost shots that appear from nowhere.

items.name: Veilrunner Skinsuit
items.description: Ultra-light stealth armor with integrated sensor baffles.
items.lore_text: The suit doesn't make you invisible. It makes the universe forget to look.

items.name: Lattice Veil Focus
items.description: Ward focus that enhances sensor spoofing and stealth fields.
items.lore_text: Not a shield. A suggestion to the universe that you were never here.

items.name: Clarity
items.description: Relic sniper rifle. Heavily self-modified. Never misses.
items.lore_text: God Eye sees what others cannot. Clarity makes the universe agree.
items.relic_lore: Vesper's primary. Can shoot weapons out of hands from 200 meters. Constantly modified.

inlays.name: Covenant Thread
inlays.effect: Emotional bond-based targeting. Share threat awareness with bonded allies.

items.name: Witness
items.description: Relic revolver. Sidearm of the God Eye.
items.lore_text: For when distance is a luxury you can't afford.
items.relic_lore: Vesper's backup. As heavily modified as its sister weapon.

items.name: Fixer's Tactical Coat
items.description: Medium armor that looks like civilian clothing. Guild standard.
items.lore_text: The best armor is the kind nobody knows you're wearing.

items.name: Covenant Thread Ward Focus
items.description: Ward focus attuned to emotional bond networks. Enhances team awareness.
items.lore_text: The thread doesn't protect you. It tells you who needs protecting.

items.name: Threshold
items.description: Relic staff. Makes bullets forget their destinations.
items.lore_text: The boundary between here and elsewhere is thinner than you think.
items.relic_lore: The Liminal's instrument. Can adjust doorways and bend locality.

inlays.name: Suture Bloom
inlays.effect: Healing resonance through scar-based witness doctrine. Mend wounds by acknowledging them.

items.name: Liminal Vestments
items.description: Robes woven with locality-bending threads. Barely qualifies as armor.
items.lore_text: The fabric exists in a state of gentle disagreement with physics.

items.name: Suture Bloom Ward Focus
items.description: Ward focus rooted in Sutured witness doctrine. Heals through acknowledgment.
items.lore_text: Every scar is a lesson. Every lesson is a door.

items.name: Navigator's Multitool
items.description: Combination diagnostic tool, emergency weapon, and Bearing focus.
items.lore_text: The tool doesn't find the path. The path finds the tool.

items.name: Pilot's Flight Suit
items.description: Medium armor with integrated navigation displays and emergency seals.

items.name: Training Blade
items.description: A simple blade for practice. Elia insists on starting with fundamentals.
items.lore_text: Every legend started with something like this.

items.name: Salvaged Work Clothes
items.description: Reinforced worker clothing from Site K-9. Not much, but it's hers.
items.lore_text: She kept them. Not because they're good armor. Because they're proof she survived.
